title: Create_column with (label, color) pairs
excerpt: I want to be able to create a column using the APIv2 and set the (label, color) pairs so they aren’t the basic (done, green) … etc. I see there is a parameter to the create_column mutation called “defaults” but there is …

posts.author: adeutsch (Atticus Deutsch)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to create a column using the APIv2 and set the (label, color) pairs so they aren’t the basic (done, green) … etc. I see there is a parameter to the create_column mutation called “defaults” but there is no documentation on how to structure this (other than its JSON) or what it even does. Any ideas?
